params.name: Anathema Scroll
params.description: Curse you! Curse you! Curse you! Curse you... Just keep reciting the curse, with certain movements, it's the most basic curse anyone can use. Easy, isn't it?
params.ss1:
Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +1
Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
params.ss2:
Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +2
Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
params.ss3:
Per 4 Novice Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +3
Novice Scrolls Used: 120/120
